mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, u.username AS author_name FROM article a JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.is_published = 1
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.is_featured DESC, a.created_at DESC
SELECT a.*, u.username AS author_name FROM article a JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.is_published = 1 ORDER BY a.likes_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT a.*, u.username AS author_name FROM article a JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.author_id = #{authorId} AND a.is_published = 1 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, author_id, image) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{image})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET views_count = views_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET likes_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET comments_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
